2024-25 Hawaii Rainbow Warriors Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 15-16 (7-13, 9th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Eran Ganot

PS/G: 70.1 (280th of 364)

PA/G: 71.2 (151st of 364)

SRS: -3.57 (194th of 364)

SOS: -1.02 (157th of 364)

ORtg: 104.2 (252nd of 364)

DRtg: 105.9 (214th of 364)
